mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.category_id AS categoryId, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.original_price AS originalPrice, p.stock, p.stock_warning AS stockWarning, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.images, p.sales_count AS salesCount, p.status, p.created_by AS createdBy, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS updatedAt, c.name AS categoryName FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE 1=1
AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND p.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND p.status = #{status}
AND p.stock <= p.stock_warning
ORDER BY p.price ASC
ORDER BY p.price DESC
ORDER BY p.sales_count DESC
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.price, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.sales_count AS salesCount, ROUND(p.price * p.sales_count, 2) AS revenue FROM product p WHERE p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.sales_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
